heading: Stream Processing Workspaces
body:
> **Important:** To request an unlisted region, add your feedback
> to the [MongoDB Feedback Portal](https://feedback.mongodb.com/?category=7529546585152608284). Your
> input helps prioritize future expansions of Atlas Stream Processing coverage.Atlas supports deploying [Stream Processing Workspaces](atlas-sp-manage-spi) in the follow Azure (Microsoft Azure) regions:**Americas:**Americas| Azure Region | Location        | Atlas Region |
| ------------ | --------------- | ------------ |
| eastus       | Virginia, USA   | US\_EAST\_1  |
| eastus2      | Virginia, USA   | US\_EAST\_2  |
| westus       | California, USA | US\_WEST     |**Europe:**Europe| Azure Region | Location    | Atlas Region |
| ------------ | ----------- | ------------ |
| westeurope   | Netherlands | EUROPE\_WEST |
